Simple & Easy

How It Works

Getting support has never been easier. Four simple steps to a healthier you.

1

Open WhatsApp

No downloads. No sign-ups. Just open WhatsApp on your phone.

2

Start a Chat

Send 'Hi Amani' to begin your health and wellness journey.

3

Get Support

Share how you're feeling. Amani listens and guides you.

4

Feel Better

Receive personalized guidance for your body and mind.

Comprehensive Care

Two Ways We Help

Whether it's a physical concern or emotional support, Medi Assistant has you covered.

Physical Health

Guidance for your body

Symptom Checker

Describe your symptoms and get guidance on next steps. Not a diagnosis, but a helpful first step.

Health Tracking

Monitor your daily wellness metrics and see patterns over time.

Triage Support

Know when to self-care, see a pharmacist, or visit a doctor.

Mental Wellness

Support for your mind

Stress Management

Learn techniques to manage work stress, anxiety, and overwhelm.

Mood Check-ins

Regular emotional check-ins with Amani, your empathetic companion.

Guided Reflection

Journaling prompts and mindfulness exercises for mental clarity.

Meet Amani

A Conversation with Care

See how Amani provides empathetic, judgment-free support when you need it most.

Amani

Online now

Ready to start your own conversation?

Chat with Amani Now

Why Choose Us

Why It's Different

Not just another health app. Not just a chatbot. Something genuinely new.

📱 Traditional Health Apps

  • ×Download required
  • ×Separate apps for physical & mental health
  • ×Generic advice
  • ×Another password to remember
  • ×Cold, clinical interface

💚 Medi Assistant with Amani

  • ✓No download needed - just WhatsApp
  • ✓Body & mind in one place
  • ✓Personalized, empathetic responses
  • ✓No account or password
  • ✓Warm, human connection

Medi Assistant provides general wellness support and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider.
